channel.title: Imperfection on Ugur's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Imperfection on Ugur's Personal Blog

item.title: The Elegance of Broken: Wabi-Sabi and the AI Aesthetic
item.description: When a diffusion model generates hands with extra fingers, most call it a failure. But what if the error is the most honest thing the system produces? Wabi-sabi, AI aesthetics, and the beauty of broken outputs.
